entry.title: Zhipu AI's GLM 5.2 Tops Open-Source Coding at 44%, Beating Rivals for Less
entry.summary: GLM 5.2 claims the top open-source spot on DeepSWE with a 44% pass@1, beating Kimi K2.7 Code by 17 percentage points on a contamination-free coding benchmark.

entry.title: Nous Research's Hermes Agent Ships Blank Slate Mode for Full Custom Control
entry.summary: Hermes Agent adds Blank Slate setup mode, letting power users hand-pick every tool instead of accepting opinionated defaults

entry.title: Exa Agent Brings $2.2B Semantic Search Directly Into Google Sheets
entry.summary: Exa brings its AI-powered web research agent directly into Google Sheets, letting anyone enrich data and build lists without writing a line of code

entry.title: Cerebras Runs Gemma 4 at 1,500 Tokens per Second, 15x Faster Than Haiku
entry.summary: Cerebras brings Google DeepMind's Gemma 4 to its wafer-scale hardware, hitting 1,500+ tokens per second â 15x faster than Claude Haiku â and launches a $5,000 hackathon to celebrate.

entry.title: GitHub Copilot CLI's Rubber Duck Uses a Rival AI to Catch Your Bugs
entry.summary: GitHub Copilot CLI goes GA with a cross-model Rubber Duck critic and on-device voice input that never leaves your machine

entry.title: Zed Adds Ctrl+F Search to AI Agent Threads, Tested on 919k-Token Chats
entry.summary: Zed merges Ctrl+F search into its AI agent panel, letting you grep long conversations with regex, case, and whole-word toggles

entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 Tops the Hardest Coding Benchmark With 70% Score
entry.summary: Claude Fable 5 takes the top spot on DeepSWE's contamination-free, long-horizon coding benchmark, dethroning GPT-5.5 with a 70% pass@1 score on harder, more realistic tasks.

entry.title: Chrome's HTML-in-Canvas API Ends 20 Years of Web Graphics Tradeoffs
entry.summary: Chrome's HTML-in-Canvas API enters origin trial, letting live DOM elements render directly inside WebGL and WebGPU textures with full accessibility preserved

entry.title: GitHub Ships PR Limits to Fight the 3.6x AI-Driven Code Flood
entry.summary: GitHub now lets maintainers cap how many open PRs any outside contributor can hold at once, with a bypass list for trusted contributors â a direct response to AI-fueled PR spam.

entry.title: Factory's AutoWiki Turns Any Codebase Into Self-Updating Docs on Every Push
entry.summary: Factory's AutoWiki generates living, narrated documentation for any codebase and keeps it in sync with every push

entry.title: Artificial Analysis' AA-Briefcase Benchmark Exposes What AI Models Can't Actually Do
entry.summary: Artificial Analysis launches AA-Briefcase, a new benchmark testing AI agents on real multi-week knowledge work projects with thousands of messy input files

entry.title: Krea Offers Artists 25% Affiliate Cuts and Free $70 Monthly Compute
entry.summary: Krea launches a structured Creator Program offering compute credits, early tool access, and a 25% affiliate cut to artists who apply
